findings.message: redis-exporter service added without corresponding Prometheus scrape job. New exporter in prod observability stack must have matching scrape configuration in prometheus.yml to be collected.
findings.suggestion:
Add a scrape_configs job for redis in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml: - job_name: redis
  static_configs:
    - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]
